summary: Web project (landing page) with warranty/service guarantees. Adding an inquiry form that sends submissions to WhatsApp number 7838867880.
architectural_notes: Inquiry form submissions route to WhatsApp number 7838867880 via wa.me link or Click-to-Chat URL

existing_features.title: Build out the InquiryForm component (frontend/src/components/InquiryForm.tsx) with fields for: Full Name, Phone Number, Email (optional), City/Location, System Size of Interest (dropdown: 1-3 kW, 3-5 kW, 5-10 kW, 10+ kW), and Message/Query. On submit, format the collected field values into a WhatsApp message URL targeting number 7838867880 (format: https://wa.me/917838867880?text=...) and open it in a new tab. Style the form consistently with the existing site theme (solar amber/charcoal palette from tailwind.config.js).

Add the InquiryForm section to App.tsx, placing it between the Services section and the BankFinanceBanner section. Add a corresponding smooth-scroll nav link labeled 'Inquiry' or 'Get Quote' in the Header component pointing to the inquiry section anchor.

new_feature_requests.summary: Add inquiry form that sends submissions to WhatsApp number 7838867880
